summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finance App Iteration 2 - Design System Overhaul. All backend APIs (23/23 tests passed). Frontend responsive design working at all breakpoints (375px, 390px, 768px, desktop). Dark mode, bottom navigation, swipeable charts, and stacked transaction cards all functional.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps bottom nav on mobile, blocking some button clicks - this is an external badge, not app code issue

passed_tests: Login page renders correctly at desktop (1920px)
Login page renders correctly at tablet (768px)
Login page renders correctly at mobile (375px, 390px)
User login with admin credentials (admin@financeapp.com / Admin@123)
Dashboard loads with summary cards (Total Income, Total Expenses, Balance)
Dark mode toggle works on dashboard
Dark mode persists between page navigations
Bottom navigation appears on mobile viewports (375px, 390px)
Bottom navigation hidden on tablet/desktop (768px+)
Bottom navigation functional - all 5 buttons present (Home, Categories, Budgets, Recurring, Export)
Transaction form works - Income/Expense toggle, Amount, Category, Date, Note fields
Transaction list shows desktop table view on large screens
Transaction list shows stacked card view on mobile
Bar chart (Monthly Trends) renders correctly
Pie chart (Expense Breakdown) renders correctly
Mobile swipeable charts with pagination dots
Analyze My Finances button triggers AI analysis
AI Insights modal shows loading state then displays results
Categories page - view default and custom categories
Categories page - Add button and form functional
Budgets page - view budgets with progress bars
Budgets page - Add button and form functional
Recurring page - view recurring transactions
Recurring page - Add button and form functional
Recurring page - Process button functional
Export CSV dropdown visible on desktop
Export PDF dropdown visible on desktop
Logout functionality works - redirects to login
Desktop navigation links (Categories, Budgets, Recurring) functional
Back button navigation on sub-pages functional
critical_code_review_comments: TransactionForm.js has ESLint warning: useEffect missing 'category' dependency - minor issue, doesn't affect functionality
CORS is set to allow all origins ('*') - acceptable for development but should be restricted in production
seed_data_creation: Backend creates admin user on startup if not exists. Test data created during pytest run (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 design overhaul complete and tested. All features from iteration 1 preserved. New features tested: dark mode toggle (persists via localStorage), bottom navigation on mobile (md:hidden breakpoint), swipeable charts on mobile with pagination dots, stacked transaction cards on mobile. AI analysis modal now working correctly - previous iteration had timeout issue which is now resolved. All responsive breakpoints tested: 375px, 390px, 768px, 1920px.

design_review.overall: Modern minimalist design inspired by Stripe/Linear/Notion successfully implemented
design_review.light_mode: Clean white backgrounds with subtle borders, good contrast ratios
design_review.dark_mode: Deep navy/slate backgrounds (#0A0E1A), proper color adjustments for text and accents
design_review.typography: Plus Jakarta Sans font, proper hierarchy with font weights
design_review.spacing: Consistent padding and margins, proper card spacing
design_review.responsive: Mobile-first approach with proper breakpoints, bottom nav on mobile, desktop nav on larger screens
design_review.charts: Recharts integration working, proper color schemes for light/dark modes
design_review.forms: Clean input styling with focus states, proper validation feedback
